Add fetchCredits() method that calls BetterContact GET /account endpoint via edge function proxy

stories.title: Database schema migration
acceptance: 'bettercontact' added to dynamic_tables.source_type CHECK constraint
'bettercontact_property' added to dynamic_table_columns.column_type CHECK constraint
bettercontact_property_name TEXT column added to dynamic_table_columns
bettercontact_requests tracking table created with RLS policies
Migration is idempotent (DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS, CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS)

sections.name: Expand source_type CHECK
sections.sql_pattern: DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS dynamic_tables_source_type_check; ADD CONSTRAINT ... CHECK (source_type IN (...existing..., 'bettercontact'))

sections.name: Expand column_type CHECK
sections.sql_pattern: DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS dynamic_table_columns_column_type_check; ADD CONSTRAINT ... CHECK (column_type IN (...existing..., 'bettercontact_property'))

sections.name: Add bettercontact_property_name column
sections.sql_pattern: ALTER TABLE dynamic_table_columns ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bettercontact_property_name TEXT DEFAULT NULL; COMMENT ON COLUMN ...

sections.name: Create bettercontact_requests table
columns: id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
organization_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
table_id UUID REFERENCES dynamic_tables(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
column_id UUID REFERENCES dynamic_table_columns(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
action TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (action IN ('enrich', 'lead_finder'))
status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'terminated', 'failed'))
submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id)

Outputs: enriched_count, cached_count, failed_count, credits_consumed

stories.title: Submit enrichment edge function
acceptance: Edge function bettercontact-enrich handles actions: submit, status, credits
submit: reads contacts from dynamic_table_rows, maps to BetterContact format (first_name, last_name, company/company_domain, linkedin_url)
submit: includes custom_fields with row_id + column_id for result mapping
submit: posts batch to BetterContact POST /async, stores request_id in bettercontact_requests
submit: creates enrichment_jobs row (status=queued), marks cells as pending
submit: registers webhook URL pointing to our webhook-integrations/bettercontact endpoint
status: polls BetterContact GET /async/{request_id} and returns current status
credits: calls BetterContact GET /account to check credit balance
Pre-flight credit check via checkCreditBalance() before submit
BYOK: reads API key from integration_credentials (provider='bettercontact'), no env fallback
Handles skip_completed flag to avoid re-enriching already-complete cells
Handles force_refresh flag to re-enrich even cached rows
Rate limiting: respects 60 req/min via fetchWithRetry with 429 handling

structure: 2. Auth: extract user via JWT, get org via organization_memberships
- Input: { table_id, column_id, row_ids?, enrich_email_address, enrich_phone_number, force_refresh?, skip_completed? }
- Get BetterContact API key from integration_credentials WHERE provider='bettercontact' AND org_id
- Fetch ALL columns for field extraction (for matching first_name, last_name, company, etc.)
- Separate cached (source_data.bettercontact exists + not force_refresh) vs needs-enrichment
- For cached: extract field from source_data.bettercontact, upsert cell with source='bettercontact_cache'
b. Mark target cells as status='pending'
c. Build BetterContact request: map row data to { first_name, last_name, company, company_domain, linkedin_url }
d. Include custom_fields: { row_id, column_id, enrichment_job_id }
f. POST to https://app.bettercontact.rocks/api/v2/async with X-API-Key header
g. Store request_id in bettercontact_requests table
- Return { processed, cached_hits, submitted, enrichment_job_id, bettercontact_request_id }
- GET /account from BetterContact with email + api_key as query params

smartMatching.description: Match ops table columns to BetterContact input fields by column label/key
patterns: email / Email → skip (it's what we're enriching)

stories.title: Async result processing — webhook + polling fallback
acceptance: Webhook handler registered in webhook-integrations router as 'bettercontact'
Webhook receives BetterContact callback, matches request_id to bettercontact_requests row
Results written to dynamic_table_cells: email in target column, status/provider in additional columns if they exist
Full response cached in dynamic_table_rows.source_data.bettercontact
enrichment_jobs updated: processed_rows incremented, status set to 'complete' when all done
bettercontact_requests updated: status='terminated', credits_consumed, completed_at
Credits deducted via logFlatRateCostEvent() based on credits_consumed from response
Polling fallback: bettercontact-enrich action=status polls with exponential backoff (2s→5s→10s→30s)
If webhook hasn't fired after 5 minutes, polling auto-processes results
Per-row error tracking: failed rows get status='failed' + error_message on cell

structure: 1. Parse webhook payload (BetterContact POST body with enrichment results)
5. Get associated table_id, column_id, enrichment_job_id from the request row
a. For each contact in data[]:
- Match back to row via custom_fields.row_id
- Cache full response in source_data.bettercontact (upsert dynamic_table_rows)
- Extract target field value using BETTERCONTACT_FIELD_MAP
- Upsert dynamic_table_cells with value, source='bettercontact', status='complete'
- If enriched=false → status='failed', error_message='Not found by BetterContact'
9. Deduct credits: logFlatRateCostEvent(client, userId, orgId, 'bettercontact', 'enrichment', creditsConsumed, 'bettercontact_enrichment')

changes: Import bettercontact handler: import { bettercontactWebhook } from './handlers/bettercontact.ts'
Add to providerHandlers: bettercontact: bettercontactWebhook
ACTION: poll_and_process
- Input: { request_id } OR { check_stale: true }
- If request_id: GET /async/{request_id}, if terminated → process results (same logic as webhook)
- If check_stale: find bettercontact_requests with status='pending' AND submitted_at < NOW() - 5min
- Process any completed results
- Exponential backoff: caller (frontend) handles retry timing (2s→5s→10s→30s)

structure: 2. Get BetterContact API key from integration_credentials
- Input: { filters: { company_name?, company_domain?, job_title?, location?, limit? } }
- If status != 'terminated' → return { status, message: 'Still processing' }
b. Create columns: First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Job Title, Company, LinkedIn, Email Status
c. Create rows from results data[], cache in source_data.bettercontact
d. Create cells for each field

methods: static async submitSearch(filters): calls bettercontact-lead-finder with action=submit
static async pollResults(requestId, autoCreateTable): calls with action=poll
static async searchAndCreateTable(filters): submit + poll loop with exponential backoff

stories.title: Cascade enrichment — BetterContact as fallback provider
acceptance: BetterContact added as provider in cascade enrichment handler
Cascade order: Apollo → AI Ark → BetterContact (configurable)
When prior providers return no email, BetterContact waterfall is triggered
BetterContact results cached in source_data.bettercontact alongside other provider caches
Field attribution tracks source as 'bettercontact' in enrich_cascade data
Async handling: cascade waits for BetterContact results (polls with backoff) before continuing
If BetterContact API key not configured for org, skip silently (don't error the cascade)

changes: Add 'bettercontact' to PROVIDER_ORDER array (after ai_ark)
Add BetterContact enrichment logic:
- Check if BetterContact API key exists for org (skip if not)
- For rows still missing email after Apollo+AI Ark:
a. Submit to BetterContact POST /async
b. Poll GET /async/{request_id} with exponential backoff
c. When terminated: extract results, update source_data.bettercontact
d. Update cascade attribution: source='bettercontact'
- Handle timeout gracefully (max 120s polling, then mark as failed)
Add BETTERCONTACT_FIELD_MAP to extract email, phone, title from response
Add 'bettercontact' and 'bettercontact_cache' to valid source values

Provider column renders as text (e.g., 'Hunter', 'Dropcontact', 'Lusha')

changes: Add 'Usage & Analytics' section below connection status
Query bettercontact_requests for org: count by status, sum credits_consumed
Display: Total Searches, Contacts Enriched, Credits Used, Success Rate
Show 'No enrichments yet' if no data
Ensure 'Provider' template in BETTERCONTACT_TEMPLATES maps to email_provider field

parallelGroups.description: Foundation — credentials, schema, skills. All independent, run in parallel.
Core enrichment + Lead Finder + frontend trigger. BC-004 is critical path; BC-007 and BC-008 can start after BC-002 completes.
Webhook receiver + status columns. Depends on BC-004. Most complex story (BC-005).
Cascade integration + analytics. Polish layer, depends on full pipeline.

estimatedTotalMinutes.note: With 3 parallel workers, Groups 1-4 take ~5.5h total (critical path: BC-002→BC-004→BC-005→BC-009)
